description.value: Create sudden loud ringing in 10-foot radius sphere. All creatures in area take [[/damage 16 type=thunder]] damage. Creatures make Fortitude saves to reduce damage. Nonmagical objects made of crystal, glass, or similar material take double damage and shatter if reduced to 0 HP.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = fails
- 1 = 1/2 damage (8)
- 2 = full damage (16)
- 3 = +8 damage (24 total) + deafened
system.weavingRoll: Air Potential + Air Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
